elements.original_description: A cartoon man in a business suit with a smug expression, clutching overflowing bags of gold coins, standing on a pile of money. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A cartoon illustration of a man in a sharp business suit with a smug, arrogant expression, tightly clutching overflowing bags of shiny gold coins, standing triumphantly on a towering pile of money, embodying a tone of greed. Professional 2D cartoon style, clean lines, vibrant colors, flat shading, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks, pure white background.
